creator: patrick@jacuzzi.local.mindstep.com
text:
The current mod_dav version in the ports is 0.9.12. The up-to-date version is
0.9.14 which fixes a lot of issues with the locking mechanisms.

Fix: The following patch updates the version currently in the ports distribution. This PR
supersedes PR# port/15241.

BTW I am the port maintainer.

How-To-Repeat: 
n/a
